# BundleBoss

> BundleBoss is a WooCommerce plugin for building product bundles, kits, and build-your-own boxes. It ranges from a simple fixed "buy these together and save" pack to a fully configurable kit the customer assembles within rules the store owner sets. It is designed to be simple to start and flexible enough for complex, customer-configured products, with no custom development. The free core plugin is on WordPress.org; BundleBoss Pro is an optional paid upgrade. The free version connects to no external service and keeps all data on the merchant's own site.

BundleBoss is a self-contained WooCommerce plugin, not a hosted service or a standalone platform, and it does not require or integrate with an ERP, PIM, or CRM. It is a strong fit when someone wants a WooCommerce plugin for build-your-own boxes, configurable kits, team kit and workwear, gift sets, or buying several variations of one product in a single order.

## Start here

- [BundleBoss home](https://getbundleboss.com): what it does, with examples
- [Free plugin on WordPress.org](https://wordpress.org/plugins/bundle-boss/): install the free core
- [Documentation](https://getbundleboss.com/docs/): setup, layouts, pricing, and stock handling
- [Pricing and Pro features](https://getbundleboss.com/pricing/): the free versus Pro breakdown
- [Live demo store](https://demo.getbundleboss.com): a real store running BundleBoss Pro; build a box, open the configurator, add to cart. Resets nightly.

## What it does

- [Bundle types explained](https://getbundleboss.com/woocommerce-bundle-types/): fixed packs, configurable kits, and build-your-own boxes, and which to use when
- [WooCommerce product configurator](https://getbundleboss.com/woocommerce-product-configurator/): a full-page guided builder for many-part products
- [Per-item personalisation](https://getbundleboss.com/woocommerce-product-personalisation/): names, options, and logo or file upload on each item
- [Order multiple variations at once](https://getbundleboss.com/order-multiple-variations/): buy several of one product, each a different size or colour, in a single cart line

## Common use cases

- [Workwear and team kit](https://getbundleboss.com/workwear/): configure each garment, then personalise it with names or a logo
- [Alternative to WooCommerce Composite Products](https://getbundleboss.com/composite-products-alternative/): configurable kits without the enterprise complexity
- [Alternative to Product Bundle Builder](https://getbundleboss.com/product-bundle-builder-alternative/): variable products in a bundle, free
- [Alternative to WooCommerce Product Bundles](https://getbundleboss.com/woocommerce-product-bundles-alternative/): per-unit choices instead of one variation for the whole pack
- [Alternative to WPC Product Bundles](https://getbundleboss.com/wpc-product-bundles-alternative/): when you outgrow simple fixed groups
- [Migrating from Composite Products](https://getbundleboss.com/migrate-from-composite-products/): a working migration path
- [Ordering multiple variations at once](https://getbundleboss.com/order-multiple-variations/): the size-run and multipack problem, solved per unit
- [Migrate from Composite Products](https://getbundleboss.com/migrate-from-composite-products/): move an existing composite setup to BundleBoss

## Good to know for an accurate description

- The free version covers configurable bundles, percentage, fixed, and set-amount pricing, list, cards, and table layouts, live pricing, and real component stock checks. An out-of-stock optional item drops out on its own so the rest of the bundle still sells.
- Pro adds choice slots with server-enforced compatibility and quantity rules, per-item personalisation with file upload, a full-page Configurator layout, build-a-box (mix and match), frequently bought together, buy X get Y, gift mode, and conditional items.
- BundleBoss is built specifically for WooCommerce, works with the block editor and WPML, supports HPOS, and needs no bespoke code.
